repo_notes.content: Luo9 Bot is a high-performance QQ chatbot framework built with Rust, utilizing NapCat as the messaging backend. It features a modular plugin architecture, asynchronous runtime with tokio, and comprehensive message/event handling systems.
repo_notes.author: System Analysis

repo_notes.content: Key technologies: Rust, tokio (async runtime), NapCat (QQ protocol), WebSocket communication, libloading (dynamic plugin loading), tracing (structured logging), serde (serialization)
repo_notes.author: Technical Stack

repo_notes.content: Project structure includes: src/main.rs (entry point), src/lib.rs (core library), src/config.rs (configuration), src/connection/ (WebSocket handling), src/handler/ (message/event/notice processing), src/plugin.rs (plugin system), src/utils/ (utilities and logging)
repo_notes.author: Project Structure

repo_notes.content: Core functionality: 1. Configuration management with TOML files 2. WebSocket connection to NapCat backend 3. Message type system (PostType, MsgType, SubType) 4. Plugin system with dynamic library loading 5. Async message processing pipeline 6. Structured logging with tracing
repo_notes.author: Core Features

repo_notes.content: Plugin system details: Uses libloading for dynamic library loading, supports both Rust and C++ plugins, provides luo9_sdk for plugin development, includes plugin configuration and prioritization
repo_notes.author: Plugin Architecture

repo_notes.content: Message flow: WebSocket reception → JSON parsing → type identification → handler dispatch (message/event/notice) → plugin processing → response sending
repo_notes.author: Message Processing

repo_notes.content: Development workflow: 1. Setup Rust toolchain 2. Configure NapCat connection 3. Build with cargo 4. Test with sample plugins 5. Deploy as system service
repo_notes.author: Development Guide

repo_notes.content: Important modules to document: LNContext (main context), LNConfig (configuration), Receiver/Sender (WebSocket), Message/Event/Notice handlers, Plugin loader, Error types, Utility functions
repo_notes.author: Documentation Focus

repo_notes.content: Target audience: QQ bot developers, Rust programmers, plugin developers, system administrators. Documentation should cover: getting started, architecture, API reference, plugin development, deployment, troubleshooting
repo_notes.author: Audience & Scope
